query:
SELECT l.id, c.title as course, l.title, LENGTH(l.content) as content_length 
FROM lessons l 
JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id 
WHERE c.courseCode = 'OLD_TESTAMENT_SURVEY' 
ORDER BY l.lessonOrder 
LIMIT 5
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT l.id, c.title as course, l.title, LENGTH(l.content) as content_length 
FROM lessons l 
JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id 
WHERE c.courseCode = 'OLD_TESTAMENT_SURVEY' 
ORDER BY l.lessonOrder 
LIMIT 5
